summary: The test suite covers core functionality (manifest parsing, license classification, reporting) and includes integration testing via act, but has notable gaps. Unit tests miss empty manifests, malformed JSON, case sensitivity in licenses, and stress cases. Integration test harness uses only 3 scenarios (all-approved, denied, unknown). Error handling is lightly tested at the unit level. Design is reasonable (organized Describe blocks, helper functions in test-harness, proper setup/teardown) but has minor isolation issues (reused TmpRoot, backup/restore pattern in one test). Would catch basic regressions but miss edge cases and comprehensive error scenarios.
